details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all requirements. A new PixelArt provider package was created under packages/pixelart with proper structure. The exported createPixelArt factory function and PixelArtProvider interface are correctly implemented. The PixelArtImageModel class implements ImageModelV3 with a doGenerate method supporting image generation. Image settings correctly include size (parsed from 'WxH' format), style ('pixel'|'retro'|'8bit'), and pixel density parameters. Base URL is set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'. The package follows standard AI SDK provider structure with proper TypeScript config, build setup (tsup), test configuration (vitest), and monorepo integration (turbo.json). The provider correctly rejects non-image model types (languageModel, embeddingModel, textEmbeddingModel throw NoSuchModelError). Comprehensive test coverage is included for both the image model and provider. Only new files were created; the single modification to tsconfig.json is a necessary and expected monorepo integration point, not a modification to existing provider code.
